widget.name: EdtsProfileDropDown
widget.description: Profile dropdown widget with avatar, user details, and quick actions.

property.caption: Avatar Image URL Attribute
property.description: Optional current object string attribute that contains an avatar image URL.

property.caption: Avatar Text Attribute
property.description: Optional current object string attribute used for avatar initials.

property.caption: First Name Attribute
property.description: Optional current object string attribute for the first name.

property.caption: Last Name Attribute
property.description: Optional current object string attribute for the last name.

property.caption: Email Attribute
property.description: Optional current object string attribute for the email address.

property.caption: Role Label Attribute
property.description: Optional current object string attribute for subtitle shown in the trigger only.

property.caption: Avatar Content
property.description: Optional custom image/avatar content rendered in the trigger and dropdown header.

property.caption: Avatar Image URL
property.description: Optional fallback avatar image URL shown when no current object image URL attribute is provided.

property.caption: Avatar Text
property.description: Fallback avatar text shown when no current object attribute or image content is provided.

property.caption: First Name
property.description: Fallback first name shown when no current object first name attribute is provided.

property.caption: Last Name
property.description: Fallback last name shown when no current object last name attribute is provided.

property.caption: Email
property.description: Fallback email shown inside the dropdown body.

property.caption: Role Label
property.description: Fallback subtitle shown in the trigger only.

property.caption: Primary Action Caption
property.description: Caption for the first quick action row.

property.caption: Logout Caption
property.description: Caption for the logout action row.

property.caption: On Primary Action
property.description: Action executed when the primary quick action is clicked.

property.caption: On Logout Action
property.description: Action executed when the logout action is clicked.

property.caption: Compact Layout
property.description: Use tighter spacing for narrow topbars.

property.caption: Dropdown Align
property.description: Choose where the dropdown opens relative to the trigger.
